# Prof. Dr. Javed Altaf

Prof. Dr. Javed Altaf is a Consultant Urologist and Professor at Liaquat University of Medical & Health Sciences (LUMHS), Hyderabad. He is an expert in advanced kidney stone and minimally invasive urological surgery with over 20 years of experience.

## Services
- Kidney Stone Treatment (PCNL)
- Minimally Invasive Surgery
- Laparoscopic Urology

## Contact & Clinic Info
- Clinic: Maryam Urology Clinic
- Phone: +92 316 2886367
- Email: contact@javedaltaf.com
